Name: Key Hold
Author: John Bindel
Description: Holds a key down for as long as you hold the Stream Deck key or pedal, and can optionally tap another hotkey just before or just after letting go. Real push-to-talk for dictation apps (Spokenly, Wispr Flow, Superwhisper), hold-to-move in games, or any feature that needs a key held rather than tapped.

Actions.Name: Hold Key
Actions.Tooltip: Holds the hotkey down while pressed. Can tap another hotkey before and/or after releasing.
